prompt: Integrate a voice command interface button next to the search bar for hands-free coding.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1 to add a voice command interface button. This button, depicted as a microphone icon, should be positioned immediately to the left of the existing search bar, located in the top-right section of the Apache NetBeans IDE window. Its purpose is to enable hands-free coding.
objects: Voice command interface button (microphone icon) immediately to the left of the search bar
